title: Gauge Widget should be available
excerpt:
It seems crazy that the gauge widget isn’t available across all accounts. It’s such a perfect view for dashboards. 
I get how it fits with CRM but I’ve been on Monday since before the CRM space existed and it seems silly…

posts.author: davidnairn (David Molesky)
posts.cookedHtml:
It seems crazy that the gauge widget isn’t available across all accounts. It’s such a perfect view for dashboards.

I get how it fits with CRM but I’ve been on Monday since before the CRM space existed and it seems silly and complicated to migrate my setup over just to get a gauge.

Come on.
